SNAP.name: Supplemental Nutrition Assistance Program
SNAP.description: Monthly food assistance loaded onto an EBT card
docs_required: Photo ID (driver's license, state ID, or passport)
Proof of address (utility bill, lease, or mail)
Pay stubs or employer letter (last 30 days)
Social Security numbers for all household members
Bank statements (last 30 days)
common_rejections: Assets over limit in non-expanded states

Medicaid.name: Medicaid
docs_required: Proof of identity (ID, passport, birth certificate)
Immigration status documentation
Proof of state residency
Proof of income (pay stubs, tax return, employer letter)

TANF.name: Temporary Assistance for Needy Families
TANF.description: Cash assistance for families with children
docs_required: Birth certificates for all children
Proof of identity for adults
Proof of income
Social Security numbers for all household members
Proof of child's school enrollment (if applicable)
TANF.work_requirements: Most states require work activity within 24 months
common_rejections: Parent immigration status (but children may still qualify)

WIC.name: Women, Infants, and Children
WIC.description: Nutrition program for pregnant/postpartum women and children under 5
docs_required: Proof of identity
Proof of residency (utility bill, lease)
Proof of income OR proof of SNAP/Medicaid/TANF enrollment
Proof of pregnancy or child's age
common_rejections: Income over 185% FPL without categorical eligibility

LIHEAP.name: Low Income Home Energy Assistance Program
LIHEAP.description: Help paying heating and cooling bills
docs_required: Proof of identity
Recent utility bills (electric, gas, heating)
Proof of income for all household members
Social Security numbers
common_rejections: Utilities included in rent (may still qualify in some states)

policy_updates.title: SNAP Income Limits Increased for 2025
policy_updates.summary: Gross income limits increased ~3.5% to match cost of living adjustment.

policy_updates.title: Medicaid Unwinding Continues
policy_updates.summary: States continuing to process renewals after COVID continuous coverage ended. If dropped, you can reapply immediately.
policy_updates.impact: Check your coverage status and renew if needed

policy_updates.title: WIC Benefit Amounts Updated
policy_updates.summary: Monthly fruit/vegetable benefit maintained at $26 for children, $44 for pregnant/postpartum.
